name: @rgrmdesign/rgrm-ds-css
description: Component styles for the RGRM design system, built on @rgrmdesign/rgrm-ds-tokens.

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true})" && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/index.css -o dist/index.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle --targets ">= 0.25%" src/paragraph/index.css -o dist/paragraph.css
